transportation_air.name: Gate B7 - Boarding Area
transportation_air.description: Rows of blue plastic seats face the floor-to-ceiling windows. Beyond the glass, your flight sits on the tarmac.

transportation_road.name: Highway On-Ramp
transportation_road.description: Your car idles in the merge lane. Brake lights stretch ahead as far as you can see.

carnival.name: Ticket Booth Area
carnival.description: A crush of families and teenagers funnel through the turnstiles. Cotton candy and diesel fumes mingle in the air.
